content:
# Flow Units

**Summary**: Units of rock with similar petrophysical properties.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-mohammed|Mohammed, 2014]] ranked reservoir flow units in the Khartam Member based on porosity and permeability.

- [[2015-alsahaf|Alsahaf, 2015]] used Flow Zone Indicator (FZI) as the primary target for prediction models.

## Scientific Context

- [[2014-mohammed|Mohammed, 2014]] Used to characterize the heterogeneity of the reservoir.

- [[2015-alsahaf|Alsahaf, 2015]] used Flow Zone Indicator (FZI) as the primary target for prediction models.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2014-mohammed|Mohammed, 2014]] Derived from porosity and permeability measurements.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Not specifically ranked in provided text, but identified as a primary objective. ([[2014-mohammed|Mohammed, 2014, p. 90]])


- FZI values were calculated from core porosity and permeability data using the Kozeny-Carmen modified equation. ([[2015-alsahaf|Alsahaf, 2015, p. 28]])
